current_exception.reason: Root IDE projection boundary is intentionally referenced by generation and quarantine checks; tracked files are README, manifest schema, and examples.

after_apply_expectation.retirement_condition: Retire exceptions.ide_root only after all three planned moves and required reference rewrites are applied, git ls-files ide is empty, .gitignore no longer exposes ide/manifests as tracked source, and strict root validators pass.
after_apply_expectation.root_constitution_note: Do not remove ide from transitional_roots in the same apply unless root constitution and validator review explicitly approve that broader contract update.

evidence_required_before_retirement: git ls-files ide returns no tracked files
git status --short --ignored ide shows only ignored generated projection output or no ide root
docs sanity passes after schema path update
reference scan classifies remaining ide/manifests references as generated-output, historical, or intentionally preserved
generated outputs remain unstaged and ignored
